src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Add the @EnableScheduling annotation to activate Spring's scheduled task execution support.
Replace hardcoded FFmpeg binary path with a value injected from application properties.
Register ServerEndpointExporter bean to enable JSR-356 WebSocket endpoints in the Spring Boot application.
Define a MultipartConfigElement bean to explicitly set the temporary file location for multipart uploads.
Replace field injection with constructor injection for VideoService and IVideoRepository to adhere to modern Spring best practices.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Added @Autowired constructor and final fields for VideoService and IVideoRepository.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Delegate file listing and filtering logic to VideoService to separate concerns and simplify the controller.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Replaced inline file listing and filtering code with videoService.getFileEntities(location).

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Add logic to build and expose links for the current location in the model.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Added model.addAttribute("links", Link.build(location)) when location is not null.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Implement a new endpoint to delete files and their associated transcoding directories.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Added @PostMapping("/del") method that deletes the file and its write directory.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Implement a new endpoint to delete only the transcoding directory for a file.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Added @PostMapping("/delTranscoding") method that deletes the write directory.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Remove unused constants and helper methods that are no longer needed after refactoring.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Removed VIDEO_SUFFIX array and isVideoFile method.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Update imports to reflect the new dependencies and removed code.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Added imports for Spring annotations, Link, IVideoRepository, VideoService, and IOException; removed unused util imports.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Replace legacy VideoCache and VideoTransformQueue dependencies with new VideoService and VideoTransformHandler services.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: private final VideoTransformHandler videoTransformHandler; private final VideoService videoService;

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Delegate M3U8 file retrieval to the new VideoService instead of using FileCopyUtils on VideoCache.
Delegate TS segment retrieval to the new VideoService instead of using FileCopyUtils on VideoCache.
Delegate video transformation queue submission to VideoTransformHandler.
Add logic to parse links and fetch file entities to populate the model in the video endpoint.
Remove the SSE-based progress endpoint and replace it with a standard model-based video queue endpoint.
Remove unused imports related to the old implementation (FileCopyUtils, SseEmitter, etc.).
Add imports for new entities and services used in the refactored controller.
Add a boolean field 'canPlay' with its getter and setter to the FileEntity class to support online playback status.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: private boolean canPlay; public boolean isCanPlay() { return canPlay; } public void setCanPlay(boolean canPlay) { this.canPlay = canPlay; }

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Move the local process execution logic to a shared utility class to reduce code duplication.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Removed local `process` method and added `import static top.itning.yunshu.yunshunas.util.CommandUtils.process;`

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Extract the hardcoded segment time value into a named constant for better maintainability.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Added `private static final String SPLIT_TIME_SECOND = "10";` and used it in command construction.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Rename the internal copy method to better reflect its purpose of standardizing video format.
Add debug logging statements to track the execution flow of video conversion steps.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Added `logger.debug` calls at start/end of `videoStandardization`, `checkComplianceWithSpecificationsForHls`, and `getVideoFrames`.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Wrap the main conversion logic in a try-catch block to handle exceptions and notify the progress listener.
Remove the unused Consumer import since the process method was moved to a utility.
Replace wildcard imports with specific imports for cleaner code.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Changed `import java.io.*;` to `import java.io.File;` and `import java.io.IOException;`.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Replace hardcoded file path with a configurable property injected via constructor.
Remove the static constant for the output directory path to support configuration.
Reduce the initial capacity and maximum size of the Guava cache.
Change fields to private final to enforce immutability and encapsulation.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: private final LoadingCache<String, String> locationMd5Cache; private final NasProperties nasProperties;

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Undertow as the embedded web server, replacing the default Tomcat.
Explicitly exclude the default Tomcat starter to prevent conflict with Undertow.
Add Spring Boot WebSocket starter to enable WebSocket support.
Add the Java-WebSocket library for low-level WebSocket handling.
Add Google Gson library for JSON processing.
Add TypeBuilder library for dynamic type generation.
Add Spring Boot configuration processor for metadata generation.
Move hardcoded dependency versions to properties for better management.
Add Aliyun Nexus mirror to speed up dependency downloads in China.
Update project version, description, URL, and license information.

src/main/resources/templates/common.html.general_idea: Add a navigation link to the home page in the sidebar menu.
Add a navigation link to the video queue page in the sidebar menu.
Add a navigation link to the download queue page in the sidebar menu.
Add a navigation link to the real-time log page in the sidebar menu.

src/main/resources/templates/index.html.general_idea: Add a UI component to display and navigate through a list of video links.
Distinguish video files from regular files in the file list by using a specific icon.
Redirect clicks on playable video files to a dedicated video player endpoint.

src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.general_idea: Introduce user interface controls for auto-scrolling and manual page refresh within the progress view.
src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.human_impl: Added a fixed control bar containing a 'Auto Scroll' switch and a 'Refresh' button, along with associated CSS styles.

src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.general_idea: Refactor the client-side message display logic to handle WebSocket text messages and support auto-scrolling.
src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.human_impl:
Replaced direct `innerHTML` appending with a `setMessageInnerHTML` function that parses lines and appends `

` tags, integrating auto-scroll logic.

src/main/resources/templates/video.html.general_idea: Include the video.js hotkeys plugin script to enable keyboard shortcuts for playback control.
Update the page title to dynamically include the current video filename using Thymeleaf.
Add a breadcrumb navigation component to display the file path hierarchy.
Change the video element tag from standard HTML5 video to video-js specific tag for better plugin integration.
Add UI buttons for deleting transcoding files, deleting videos, and copying video paths.
Add a switch to toggle MSE (Media Source Extensions) resource usage to fix playback speed issues in some browsers.
Add a table to display a list of files and directories with icons and navigation capabilities.
Initialize video.js with playback rates, hotkeys configuration, and MSE override settings based on user preference.
Implement JavaScript functions to handle AJAX requests for deleting videos and transcoding files.
Implement JavaScript logic to handle navigation when clicking on files or directories in the list.
Implement JavaScript function to copy the current video's HLS stream URL to the clipboard.
